title: Untangle dependency graph
description: Output contract emitted by the dependency analyzer and consumed by the Untangle frontend. This is the seam between backend and frontend — version it and treat changes as breaking.

version.description: Schema version. Bump on breaking change.

appVersion.description: Untangle release that produced this graph (shown in the webapp footer).

latestVersion.description: Newest Untangle release available (server-side GitHub check), or null if unknown/disabled. The footer shows an 'update available' hint when this is newer than appVersion.

latestVersionUrl.description: Link to the latest release's page (target of the footer update hint).

generatedAt.description: When the analysis ran. Drives the staleness badge.

languages.description: Palette/legend metadata for languages used across the org.

systems.description: Logical groupings (teams / domains). Rendered as titled clusters.

color.description: Hex; used for the cluster title + accents.

id.description: Unique, stable. Used as graph id and in edges.

system.description: System id, or "shared" for org-wide components.

language.description: Primary language id (must exist in languages[]).

kind.description: hub = shared component (lives in the central cluster); anchor = a lib other repos depend on; repo = leaf/consumer.

type.description: Drives the icon drawn inside the node.

sourceUrl.description: Link to the repo's source page.

description.description: Short summary, or null if none available.

lastCommit.description: Last commit timestamp (frontend renders relative + stale flag).

edges.description: Directed: source DEPENDS ON target (arrow points at the dependency). Dependents of X = incoming edges; blast radius of X = transitive incoming closure.

reasons.description: Why source is coupled to target. Optional/enrich incrementally — emit coarse edges with empty reasons first.
